skill1.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects all Burst 3 allies who previously used their Burst Skill.
skill1.note: Scope is the run-E fix: targets only allies who already burst this rotation (stage 3), not the unfiltered burstCasters set that was feeding crown/rouge every rotation.

skill1.kitLine: ATK ▲ 60% of the skill user's ATK for 10 sec.
skill1.note: casterAtkPct = %-of-caster-ATK basis, matches 'of the skill user's ATK'.
Engine gates trueDamagePct by flavor, so this lands only on true-flavored damage (the grenades).

skill1.kitLine: Recovers 10% of damage as HP for 10 sec.
skill1.note: Lifesteal skipped — no HP-pool consumer modeled. Per note F1/F2: it targets bursted Burst-3 allies and would fire their 'recovery' triggers if a B3 recovery-consumer comp appears (latent gap; inert at scope lock).

skill2.kitLine: Activates during Full Burst. Affects enemies within attack range nearest to the crosshair every 2 sec.
skill2.note: REWORK (tier audit): baseline 420% true dot every 2s for 10s on EVERY full-burst enter, replacing the old hitCount:3 blend that assumed ~25% FB uptime (validated fights run ~75%, a ~2x undercount). 'nearest to crosshair / within attack range' resolves to the partless boss at scope lock.

skill2.kitLine: Flash Grenade Toss: Deals 420% of final ATK as True Damage.
skill2.note: atkPct scales off final ATK; flavor:true routes her S1/burst True Damage buffs onto the grenades only.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when using Burst Skill. Affects self. Flash Grenade Toss activation time condition ▼ 1 sec for 10 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[1].trigger(burstCast) + dot atkPct:420 intervalSec:2 durationSec:10 flavor:true
skill2.note: The interval reduction (2s→1s) is encoded as a SECOND identical every-2s stream on her own burstCast, so the combined rate during her burst windows is exactly 1/s (rate-equivalent to the kit; tick phasing differs but totals match). Fires only on HER burst, correctly inert on other B3s' rotations.

burst.note: Self ATK (atkPct), distinct from S1's caster-relative grant.
Applies only to true-flavored damage (grenades), per engine flavor gating.

burst.kitLine: Special Modification — Charge Speed ▼ 300% / Charge Damage ▲ 1500% for 1 round(s).
burst.note: chargeTimeSec:4 = base 1s ×4 (▼300% as ×4 charge time); chargeMultPct:1750 = base 250% + 1500%. ⚠ The '1 round(s)' cap is NOT encoded (no maxShots) → over-fires 2 specials per 10s window. Documented in kit-status findings F3 but ABSENT from the override's own unmodeled array — a documentation asymmetry in the override file.

documentedConfounds.text: F3: Special Modification over-fires 2 specials/window vs kit '1 round' (no maxShots) = ~45% of her total sim damage; kit-literal would drop the sim ~20%. 'board 0.950 may lean on the 2nd shot — measure popups before touching.'
documentedConfounds.why: Over-credit relative to kit-literal (HOT direction), so it MASKS the current COLD residual — fixing to 1 round would make the ratio colder, UNLESS the real game also fires 2 specials (the finding's open hypothesis). Unresolved measurement; not disclosed in the override file's unmodeled array.

documentedConfounds.text: S1 10% lifesteal skipped (no HP-pool consumer). Targets bursted Burst-3 allies; would fire their 'recovery' triggers if a B3 recovery-consumer comp appears.
documentedConfounds.why: Inert at scope lock (no HP pool, no recovery consumer). Latent gap only for Crown-type on-recovery comps.

documentedConfounds.text: S2 Flash Grenade REWORKED: exact 1/s model replaced the old hitCount:3 blend that assumed ~25% FB uptime (validated fights ~75%, a ~2x undercount).
documentedConfounds.why: Resolved a prior COLD undercount; the current encoding is designed to be rate-faithful (baseline 2s stream + burstCast 2s stream = 1/s in her windows).

documentedConfounds.text: S1 scope fix (run-E 2026-07-13): unfiltered burstCasters target was feeding her +60%-of-caster ATK grant to crown/rouge every rotation (source of their ~1.44 heat); now stage-3 filtered.
documentedConfounds.why: Resolved a prior HOT over-credit; validated from run-E video. Context for the retune, not a live gap.

documentedConfounds.text: Board is COLD at 0.902 (n=2, both PE elec DPS vs Water boss — her elemental-advantage comp), but no documented confound explains a ~10% undercount: lifesteal is inert, S2 rework was a warm-fix, S1 scope fix removed heat, and F3 is a HOT over-credit masking the cold.
documentedConfounds.why: The residual cold is undocumented — likely RL cadence/ammo economy, special-modification landing rate, or comp-side basis, none of which carry a caveat. The F3 over-fire means the true kit-literal gap is even colder than 0.902.

authorIntentSummary: The author modeled Ada as an RL charge-attacker whose damage is dominated by true-flavored Flash Grenade dots and a Special Modification charge shot. S1 grants bursted Burst-3 allies (stage-3 scoped, per the run-E fix) +60% caster-ATK and +50% True Damage; S2 was reworked into two interleaved 420%-ATK true dots (baseline every FB enter + a second stream on her own burstCast) to faithfully hit a 1/s rate during her windows, replacing an undercounting hitCount blend; burst gives self +40% ATK / +42% True Damage plus a weaponSwap special charge (4s charge, 1750% mult). Known-not-faithful: the Special Modification '1 round' cap is unencoded so it over-fires 2 specials/window (kit-status finding F3, ~45% of her total, an open popup-measurement) — and this gap is NOT disclosed in the override's own unmodeled array. The 10% lifesteal is a deliberate inert skip. The board reads COLD (0.902, n=2) and that residual is not explained by any documented confound — the F3 over-fire actively masks it.
